turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, this is Sam with SunPeak Solar calling about solar options for your home.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Honestly, I'm not interested. Please take me off your list.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I hear you, but solar could save you thousands over a few years.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: No. I already said I'm not interested.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: It's just 15 minutes for a free consultation, no obligation.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, but if you change your mind—
